negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: common_sense_dd7a37dd-f5c6-4b87-ab1d-b4c402bb1d34
prompt: A man with a stubbled beard and short hair, dressed in a dark sportcoat, shirt, and pants, walks and talks in a luxurious, opulent interior. The environment exudes elegance with a color palette of white, gold, and black, illuminated by a warm blend of artificial and natural lighting from the windows and the ceiling, respectively. White, long pillars extend from the floor up to the high ceilings, with intricately molded, grandly indented tops that curve down to meet each pillar. A staircase with black railing mesh spirals up, adorned with thinly rectangular window panels. Dark and glossy countertops flank both sides; the left countertop features a silvery, metallic faucet indicative of a kitchen area, while the right countertop holds chairs and a fancy decoration centerpiece depicting small, white figures with golden hair, enhancing the grandeur.  The man, wearing a gray wristwatch on his left hand, approaches the camera while speaking and gesturing animatedly. The camera begins with a medium shot, then pushes out and arcs to the left, orbiting around the man to reveal more of the vast, spacious interior. The brick-patterned ceiling above is lined with white lighting, and the cupboards to the right feature curved indentations on their paneling. As the camera continues to arc, it captures the circular table with chairs and windows that hint at green trees just outside. The sequence ends with the man coming to a stop at the circular table, still engaged in conversation.
